heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about any of the options or types discussed in this guide, see the
following API documentation:

- [MongoClientOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html)

- [mongodbLogComponentSeverities](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#mongodbLogComponentSeverities)

- [mongodbLogMaxDocumentLength](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#mongodbLogMaxDocumentLength)

- [mongodbLogPath](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#mongodbLogPath)
